message:
feat(core): add code_scanner bridge for ultimate_bug_scanner (ubs)

CodeScanner wraps the ubs CLI via SubprocessBridge for scanning code
and pane output.  Includes ScanFinding, ScanReport, ScanTotals types
matching ubs JSON output format, severity classification, and
scan_path/scan_staged/scan_diff methods.  All calls fail-open.
32 unit tests.

Also fixes Rust 2024 pattern error in diagram_render.rs.

Closes ft-2whau.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
